title: MC-Drone
description: A FPV simulator Partially inspired by Ro-Drone
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54cca1f6d7ed5915e37d74c827c273690ae365a7.png)

MC-Drone is an FPV simulator modpack for Fabric 1.21.6 that recreates real-life FPV drone flying in Minecraft. It features shader compatibility, a small-town map with shops, houses, and farms, in-game flight instructions, and multiple teleport points for smooth and flexible FPV practice.

**Better With Controller**                                  
(Tested With PS5 Dualsence)                                                        
(You may need to Remap Controls)

**Map made by heyitskad**                                                          
[Pine River [Minecraft Small Town]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/pine-river-highly-realistic-small-town/)

**Inspired by [Ro-Drone](https://www.roblox.com/games/6585596170/RO-DRONE)**

[![fabric logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d754654ab049fe270502ba5115c970e10bcf8df8_0.webp)](https://fabricmc.net/)
